name: headwater
description: Headwater single-user social network federating over encrypted email (chatmail), with daemon and web frontend

scripts.setup: pnpm --dir daemon install && pnpm --dir frontend install && electron_config_cache=desktop/.cache/electron pnpm --dir desktop install
scripts.build: pnpm --dir frontend build && pnpm --dir daemon build && pnpm --dir desktop build && pnpm --dir desktop run stage:resources && pnpm --dir desktop run verify:resources
scripts.test: pnpm --dir daemon test && pnpm --dir frontend test && pnpm --dir desktop test
scripts.check: pnpm --dir daemon check && pnpm --dir frontend check && pnpm --dir desktop check
